name: phi_gradient_descent

description.short: Phi-weighted gradient descent optimization using the golden ratio
description.long: A gradient descent optimizer that uses the golden ratio (φ = 1.618...) for adaptive learning rate control. The learning rate increases by φ when the objective decreases, and decreases by φ^(-2) when it increases, creating a natural oscillation around the optimal learning rate that mirrors fibonacci spirals in the optimization landscape.
description.mathematical: xₜ₊₁ = xₜ - αₜ∇f(xₜ), where αₜ₊₁ = αₜ × φ if f(xₜ₊₁) < f(xₜ), else αₜ₊₁ = αₜ × φ⁻²

coefficients.description: For Motoko: coefficients defining quadratic f(x) = Σᵢ cᵢxᵢ²
coefficients.note: In JavaScript SDK, you can pass an actual function instead

minimizer.description: The argument that achieves the minimum

converged.description: Whether the algorithm converged within tolerance

complexity.algorithm: Gradient descent with phi-adaptive learning rate

phi_mechanics.acceleration: α → α × φ when objective decreases
phi_mechanics.deceleration: α → α × φ⁻² when objective increases
phi_mechanics.rationale: The golden ratio creates self-similar oscillations in learning rate, avoiding both slow convergence (too small) and divergence (too large). This mimics natural growth patterns seen in sunflower seed arrangements and nautilus shells.

comparison_with_standard.standard_gradient_descent: Fixed learning rate, may converge slowly or diverge
comparison_with_standard.phi_gradient_descent: Adaptive learning rate with golden ratio scaling, more robust convergence

special_cases.non_convex: May find local minimum, initial point matters
special_cases.ill_conditioned: Phi adaptation helps navigate long narrow valleys

errors.mismatched_lengths: x0 and coefficients must have same length (Motoko)

references: The Golden Ratio: The Story of PHI, the World's Most Astonishing Number - Mario Livio
Fibonacci Numbers and the Golden Ratio in Biology - Hoenig & Patek

proof_recording.records: Stores input hash, output hash, iteration count, and convergence status
